overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white cape exploring the utilitarian interior of a spaceship or space station. The character moves through compact crew quarters with bathroom facilities, transitions through a supply room with storage containers, and approaches an elevator where an NPC stands guard.

events.description: character turns right to face toilet area and sink

agents.ego_description: walking through tight crew quarters examining metal shelving, toilet fixtures, and wall-mounted sink

futuristic wall-mounted toilet unit with metallic finish

segments.scene_description: The character explores a compact, industrial crew quarters with metal bunk beds and exposed piping. Moving through the tight space, they examine a wall-mounted toilet and angular sink before approaching a metal doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: supply room with medical storage containers

events.description: exits bathroom through sliding glass door into supply room with white storage containers

wall-mounted storage lockers with metal doors

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bathroom into a supply room through a sliding glass door. The space contains white storage containers, supply crates, and metal benches. The character walks steadily toward an elevator doorway visible at the far end.

events.description: NPC guard comes into view standing with arms crossed near elevator door

agents.ego_description: approaching elevator where an NPC stands guard near the door

notable_agents.action: standing guard with arms crossed near the elevator door

entered.detail: elevator entrance with metal doors and illuminated interior
illuminated sign reading ELEVATOR mounted above doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an elevator lobby where an NPC guard stands with arms crossed. The elevator sign is illuminated above the metal doors. As the character moves forward, the storage containers and benches shift from the right to the left side of the frame, indicating movement through the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the utilitarian interior of a spaceship, transitioning from cramped crew quarters into a wider supply corridor and finally toward a guarded elevator. It begins in a compact industrial space, moving past metal bunk beds and exposed piping to examine a wall-mounted toilet and angular sink. As the character passes through a sliding glass door, the environment opens into a supply room filled with white storage containers, crates, and metal benches. The scene then shifts toward the far end of the corridor, where the storage elements slide from the right to the left of the frame as the camera approaches an elevator lobby. Finally, the movement concludes as the character reaches the illuminated elevator doors where an NPC guard stands waiting with arms crossed.
